response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in diverse projects, but lacks explicit evidence of IT architecture leadership, UML expertise, and German proficiency (only 'Basic'), which are critical for this executive-level role in a German-market consulting firm.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack leadership across languages, platforms, and DevOps infrastructure
Strong track record of mentoring and conducting technical workshops
concerns: German language proficiency listed as 'Basic' — below required C1 level
No clear evidence of UML modeling or formal IT architecture design experience
All roles listed are based in India; lacks demonstrable experience in German-speaking client environments
